---
title: "STAT+"
page-layout: article
---

# STAT+

## Description

News and analysis platform covering biotechnology, pharmaceuticals, clinical trials, health policy, and healthcare business. Supports research on biomedical innovation and health industry trends.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** News & Current Events, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** News & Current Events, Health & Biomedical Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-stat-plus)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
